---
title: "Preserving Survey Data"
author: 
  - "Lars Vilhuber"
  - "Laurel Krovetz"
date: January 14 2026
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [night, style.css]
    scrollable: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    reference-location: document
    width: 1200
    height: 675
    widescreen: true
    center: true
    transition: slide
    logo: logo.png
    footer: ""
    slide-number: true
    preview-links: false
    chalkboard:
      theme: chalkboard

---


```{r config,include=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(here)
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(qualtRics)
library(lubridate)
library(qrcode)

source(here::here("presentation",'global-libraries.R'))
# The repository name

message(Sys.getenv("GITHUB_REPOSITORY"))

# Process the repository name to generate the URL
# - split the two components
# - combine them into a URL with 'github.io' in the middle

SUBDIRECTORY <- "presentation/presentation.html" # Leave this empty if this file is in the main directory of the repository

GITHUB_REPOSITORY <- Sys.getenv("GITHUB_REPOSITORY")
GITHUB_REPOSITORY_PARTS <- strsplit(GITHUB_REPOSITORY, "/")[[1]]
REPOSITORY_URL <- paste0("https://github.com/", GITHUB_REPOSITORY)

WEBSITE_URL <- paste0("https://", GITHUB_REPOSITORY_PARTS[1], ".github.io/", GITHUB_REPOSITORY_PARTS[2], "/", SUBDIRECTORY)
WEBSITE_SHORT <- paste0(GITHUB_REPOSITORY_PARTS[1], ".github.io/", GITHUB_REPOSITORY_PARTS[2], "/", SUBDIRECTORY)


```
{{< include ../00-survey-config.Rmd >}}

{{< include 00-introduction1.md >}}

{{< include 00-introduction2.md >}}

{{< include 00-survey-qrcode.md >}}

{{< include 01-goals.md >}}

{{< include 02-notes-on-goals.md >}}

{{< include 03-preservation.md >}}

{{< include 05-example-survey.md >}}

# Creating a survey in Qualtrics

{{< include 10-creating-survey.md >}}

{{< include 11-qualtrics-data.md >}}

{{< include 12-qualtrics-survey-specs.md >}}

{{< include 16-process-workflow.md >}}

# Processing data in R

{{< include 20-processing-R.md >}}

{{< include 21-API-key.md >}}

{{< include 22-loading-data-R.md >}}

{{< include 23-cleaning-R.md >}}

{{< include 24-processing-R.md >}}

{{< include 30-present-data.md >}}

# Using an API to streamline the process



# Survey results

{{< include 40-survey-results.md >}}

# Keeping your secrets secret

{{< include 50-secrets.md >}}

{{< include 51-API-key-secret.md >}}

{{< include 52-API-key-workflow.md >}}

# Archiving

{{< include 60-archiving.md >}}

# The end! Thanks for your attention.
